name: Maramures
summary: Mountain villages with strong woodcraft and winter ritual traditions.

games.name: Hora satului
games.description: Community circle dance performed during village celebrations.

costumes.name: Camasa cu broderie neagra
costumes.description: White shirt with dense black embroidery and woven belt.

traditions.name: Datini de iarna
traditions.description: Masked processions and songs symbolizing renewal and protection.

images.alt: Traditional Maramures house and costume motif
